ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, pure sea salt, no fortification
Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant

ingredients_text: Dark Chocolate (60%) (Sugar, Cocoa Mass, Cocoa Butter, Emulsifier: Soya Lecithin, Natural Vanilla Flavouring), Corn Thins (40%) (Corn, Sea Salt, Corn Oil). (Minimum Cocoa Solids 52.5%).
